visual_description: A woman with blonde hair sits across from a man with dark hair and a plaid shirt at a diner table, both holding hands. Other patrons are seated at nearby tables, some visible in the background behind a counter with a “SODA 60¢” sign. The woman leans toward the man, her head tilted slightly, while he looks at her with his arms crossed.
audio_description: The audio features a high-pitched, fast-paced, and loud voice with heavy breathing and gasps.
